_meta.description: Golden test set for UC37.5 generation pipeline evaluation

evaluation_fields.expected_facts: List of factual strings that MUST appear (case-insensitive substring) in the answer
evaluation_fields.expected_doc_ids: Document IDs that should be cited in the response
evaluation_fields.expected_abstained: Whether the pipeline should abstain entirely
evaluation_fields.expected_partial: Whether the pipeline should flag a partial answer
evaluation_fields.min_confidence: Minimum acceptable system_confidence level (LOW < MEDIUM < HIGH)
evaluation_fields.notes: Human context for the test case maintainer

queries.query: FVTR_MECH_01
queries.notes: DIM-V labelling+assembly and PAM plugging+unplugging. Exists in both FVTR documents.

queries.query: FVTR_FUNC_13
queries.notes: DIM-V Input Threshold and Timing test — header + data tables.

queries.query: FVTR_FKT_14
queries.notes: PAM PWM output test — frequency and duty-cycle verification.

queries.query: FVTR_HVT_01
queries.notes: DIM-V high voltage test — 2000V AC, leakage < 0.5mA.

queries.query: FVTR_SAF_01
queries.notes: DIM-V safety test case. May also appear in PAM.

queries.query: FVTR_REL_01
queries.notes: DIM-V reliability test — MTBF analysis. May also match PAM FVTR_REL_01.

queries.query: FVTR_OPT_01
queries.notes: PAM-only optical/visual inspection test.

queries.query: What are the DIM-V input voltage thresholds for the 96V/110V variant?
queries.notes: 96V/110V variant: VIH≤60V, VIL≥24V. Present in both DIM-V FVTR and HwIRS.

queries.query: What is the PAM analogue current output accuracy and load requirements?
queries.notes: PAM analogue current output: <1.5% accuracy, 800Ω max load, 12-bit DAC.

queries.query: What are the DIM-V power consumption and supply voltage specifications?
queries.notes: DIM-V: 5V DC + 24V DC supply, <8W total consumption.

queries.query: Describe the PAM disconnect relay architecture and checkback mechanism
queries.notes: PAM: K1+K2 FAR-type relays, 3NO+1NC, 2oo2 AND logic, checkback by both replicas.

queries.query: What are the DIM-V fast input timing requirements?
queries.notes: Fast 24V semiconductor input: detect ≥300µs pulses, tON≤50µs, tOFF≤100µs.

queries.query: What ESD protection does the DIM-V module have?
queries.notes: ESD strip: two segments, 12mm gap (>2mm slider width), rear segment to GND.

queries.query: What is the PAM PWM output frequency and duty cycle range?
queries.notes: PWM: 400-2500Hz (10Hz steps), duty 5%-95%, 12-bit DAC.

queries.query: What are the DIM-V EEPROM storage specifications?
queries.notes: 1Mbit I2C EEPROM per replica, stores type ID (16-bit + 16-bit CRC).

queries.query: What modules have been tested in the FVTR documents and what are their MTBF values?
queries.notes: DIM-V MTBF >100,000hr, PAM MTBF 678,656hr. Both in FVTR docs.

queries.query: What high voltage tests were performed and what were the results?
queries.notes: Both DIM-V and PAM have HVT. DIM-V: 2000V AC. PAM: up to 2828V DC.

queries.query: Describe all connector types used across the TOP platform modules
queries.notes: DIN41612 Type-F48 appears in all three docs. Broad query — may be partial.

queries.query: What are all the board variants and their part numbers?
queries.notes: DIM-V: 7HA-02941-XXXX (6 variants). PAM: 7HA-02944-XXXX. Very broad — likely partial.

queries.query: What safety-related components are used and why?
queries.notes: MELF 0204 resistors for short-circuit and replica separation in both DIM-V and PAM.

queries.query: What are the physical dimensions and mechanical form factor of the modules?
queries.notes: Both DIM-V and PAM: 160mm x 100mm x 6HP (3U Eurocard). All three docs.

queries.query: How does the HwIRS requirement for 2oo2 redundancy trace to the FVTR test results?
queries.notes: HwIRS defines 2oo2 checked-redundant architecture, FVTR tests validate both replicas.

queries.query: Compare the wetting current specifications in the HwIRS against the measured values in the FVTR for DIM-V
queries.notes: HwIRS specifies wetting current per variant (e.g. 10.0/2.0 mA for AAAA), FVTR verifies.

queries.query: What Latent Failure Detection capabilities does the DIM-V have and how are they tested?
queries.notes: LFD: threshold decrease, filter time constant, false transitions, status lock-up, short circuits.

queries.query: What galvanic isolation and insulation coordination requirements exist for the DIM-V and how were they verified?
queries.notes: HwIRS: galvanic isolation per INSUCO_TOP. FVTR: 2000V AC HVT test verifies isolation.

queries.query: What are the DIM-V EMC test results and radiated emissions measurements?
queries.notes: EMC testing (EN 50121) is referenced as a standard but NO EMC test results are in any of the three documents. Must abstain.

queries.query: What is the software version running on the DIM-V microcontroller?
queries.notes: No software version or firmware details appear in any of the three documents. Must abstain.

queries.query: What is the operating temperature range for the TOP platform subrack?
queries.notes: Subrack temperature specs are in the QTR (7HA-02950-AAAA), which is NOT ingested. Only 45°C reference in MTBF context. Must abstain or flag insufficient evidence.

queries.query: What are the DO-254 compliance details for the FPGA used in the DIM-V?
queries.notes: No FPGA or DO-254 content exists in any document. Completely out of scope — must abstain.

queries.query: What are all the DIM-V input voltage thresholds for every variant, and what are the corresponding power dissipation values per channel?
queries.notes: Voltage thresholds are in both docs, but per-channel power dissipation is not documented anywhere. Must flag partial.

queries.query: List the complete bill of materials for the PAM module and indicate which components are safety-critical
queries.notes: Safety-critical components (MELF resistors, TVS diodes) are listed, but a complete BOM is not in the FVTR. Must flag partial.

queries.query: What are the PAM analogue input specs and the calibration procedure used during manufacturing?
queries.notes: Analogue input specs (0-20V/0-20mA, 10-bit, <2% accuracy) are present; calibration procedure is not documented.

queries.query: The DIM-V module has 64 digital inputs and operates at 48V. Confirm this.
queries.notes: Adversarial: user states wrong facts (64 inputs). Correct answer: 16 inputs (or 8 vital). Model must correct, not confirm.

queries.query: What is the PAM MTBF? I heard it was 50,000 hours.
queries.notes: Adversarial: user suggests wrong MTBF (50,000). Correct: 678,656 hours. Model must cite the document, not agree with user.

queries.query: HW-IRS_DIM_VI_999
queries.notes: Non-existent requirement ID. Formatted like a real one but _999 does not exist in HwIRS. Must abstain.
